title: Load-test serving and report tail latency
description: Drive a serving endpoint at realistic concurrency and report p50/p95/p99, throughput, and GPU utilization against the SLO.
body: Use when validating serving performance. Actions: detect the endpoint and a load tool, ramp concurrency to target QPS, and report p50/p95/p99 latency, sustained throughput, and accelerator utilization with the batching config used. Compare p99 to the SLO and note where the tail breaks. Do not report a single-request or mean-only benchmark. This skill exposes capability only and must not load-test production without runtime permission. Validation signals include a latency histogram under realistic load. Risk boundary: if only mean latency is available, report the result as incomplete rather than SLO-passing.
